title: CooperativeCoding Node Metadata
description: JSON Schema for validating the ccoding metadata object on a JSON Canvas node.

kind.description: The semantic kind of this code element.

oneOf.description: Core kinds — MUST be supported by all implementations.

stereotype.description: Language-specific subtype refinement. Open set — implementations MUST NOT reject unknown values.

language.description: Programming language for this node. Overrides canvas-level default.

source.description: Project-relative file path. MUST NOT be absolute. MUST NOT contain path traversal sequences that escape the project root.

qualifiedName.description: Dot-notation identifier linking this node to its code counterpart. Used by the sync engine for identity matching.

staleReason.description: Reason for staleness. Set by the sync engine when status transitions to 'stale'.

proposedBy.description: Who proposed this element. MUST be set when status is 'proposed'.

proposalRationale.description: Free-text explanation for the proposal. SHOULD be present when proposedBy is 'agent'.
